g.text: Transfer ke nomor VA per tagihan
Transfer ke rek sekolah, unggah bukti
Pembayaran sebagian (cicilan) tersedia setelah memilih metode.
Three payment methods, one consistent flow. QRIS + VA = auto-confirm via gateway webhook; manual = admin verifies receipt upload.
Replaces the placeholder "Bayar via Transfer" alert.
• Bayar Sekarang full-width tile inside the bill card
(only on unpaid + partial; paid rows show "Lihat bukti")
Bottom sheet, recap card + 3 method tiles + Lanjut.
• Single-radio selection · sticky Lanjut button shows total
Midtrans Snap API (recommended) atau Xendit Invoice.
School pilih provider via env config.
• VA — bank logo, VA number with copy, expiry timer,
• Manual — list rek sekolah + upload bukti picker

UX accelerator. Once webhook lands → push notification.
card with breakdown, Unduh / Bagikan / Kembali)
status di tab Tagihan", admin akan verifikasi 1–24 jam)
